# Cloud Campus 
CloudCampus is a comprehensive school management system connecting administrators, vice principals, discipline masters, teachers, and parents through role-specific dashboards.

Key Features
 Academic Tools: Timetables auto-detect current classes; marks entry by sequence/subject with enrollment checks; document publishing (lessons/books).
 Discipline Flow: Parents submit justifications (with files); DMs approve/reject/punish; track absences/punishments.
 Communication: Role-based chat, targeted notifications (e.g., class-wide to parents), in-app toasts, and mobile push notifications.
 Admin Controls: User/class/timetable/subject management; stats dashboards with charts.
 Bilingual: Full English and French language support built in.
